structural_verification.evidence: CEProcessFill doesn't echo OB session in MFR. After OB VC, stale MFRs accepted. Fix: add ob_session field to MFR, guard in OBReceiveMFR.

proposal.technique_name: multi-source vector clocking with per-source cursors (OB session echo in MFR return path)
proposal.claim: CEProcessFill sends MFR to msgs_ce_to_ob without echoing the originating OB session, so OBReceiveMFR cannot distinguish MFRs produced from current-session fills vs. rolled-back-session fills, allowing phantom CEFinalization effects after OB view change.

review.orthogonality_to_step2: confirmed — step 2 guards CE session staleness, step 4 guards OB session staleness; independent failure modes

diff_correctness.CEProcessFill_change: sound — echoes msg.session (OB session) as ob_session field in MFR
diff_correctness.OBReceiveMFR_change: sound — adds msg.ob_session = ob_primary[m] conjunct to existential guard

review.composition_check: clean — combined guard: msg.market=m /\ msg.session=ob_cached_ce_session[m] /\ msg.ob_session=ob_primary[m]

issues.description: Stale MFRs with wrong ob_session accumulate under LoseCEtoOB (no fairness). Matches existing msgs_view_change pattern.
OBFinalizationFillCoherence property not formally defined. Deferred to future properties pass.
Multiple stale Fills from same defunct OB session all blocked post-OBViewChange. No partial acceptance scenario.

judgment.ruling: Proposal accepted. Trace valid and fully reproducible from spec. Fix is mechanically correct and compositionally clean with step 2.
